originalTitle: The best early Amazon Prime Day deals so far
summary: Amazon’s earlier-than-usual Prime Day doesn’t begin until June 23rd, but there are several even earlier deals on must-have products that you can check out right now. To name some examples, Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 are selling at their cheapest-ever price at Amazon and Walmart (though, the sale keeps playing peek-a-boo). Also, you can grab Ring’s […]
content: Amazon’s earlier-than-usual Prime Day doesn’t begin until June 23rd, but there are several even earlier deals on must-have products that you can check out right now. To name some examples, Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 are selling at their cheapest-ever price at Amazon and Walmart (though, the sale keeps playing peek-a-boo). Also, you can grab Ring’s latest battery-powered doorbell for $60 off and it includes a free Indoor Cam Plus with purchase. There are also enough early Apple deals and discounts on fantastic robovacs that we’ve spun up coverage ahead of next week. While the pre-Prime Day deals are looking good so far, you may not see the brands or products you’re looking for — hopefully, those deals will come later in June. Still, we’ve only included early deals that meet the criteria we hold for all our commerce coverage: they’re good products sold at attractive prices. We’ll update this post frequently ahead of Prime Day. Featured Products Apple Watch Series 11 Amazon Kindle Colorsoft Essentials Bundle Lego Ideas - Van Gogh “Starry Night” set Govee Table Lamp Classic Headphone / earbud deals * Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 have been available at their lowest price to date for the past week or so. Originally $249, the noise-canceling, wireless earbuds are $179 at Amazon and Best Buy — no membership required. Walmart has a product page that lists $169 as a sale price, though it’s out of stock at the time of publication. The AirPods Pro 3 are the latest earbuds from Apple, packing better bass and active noise cancellation than their predecessor, plus the ability to do some light fitness tracking, among other niceties. Read our review. [Product: Bose QuietComfort Ultra headphones (second-gen) | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FDKQ2FG6?tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fbose-quietcomfort-ultra-headphones-2nd-gen-black%2FJ7C5V6W7LP%2Fsku%2F6642778%3Futm_source%3Dfeed%26extStoreId%3D%26ref%3D212%26loc%3DBoseHD%26gclsrc%3Daw.ds%26gad_source%3D1%26gad_campaignid%3D19716535611%26gbraid%3D0AAAAAD-ORIgCZw_CnJk10M8F1qjLLR4Dc%26gclid%3DCj0KCQjw3K7RBhDJARIsAKRtP5SJyrABDYGXfJNISAcq26aFRMFPQHMnwmZKYEisnruApX3XVv_i-YcaAqsKEALw_wcB] * The AirPods 4 on sale at Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy for $99 ($30 off). Apple’s entry-level earbuds offer richer bass than previous generations along with a more robust IP54 rating for water and dust resistance. They match the latest AirPods Pro in voice call quality and work well with other Apple devices too, though they lack more advanced features like active noise cancellation. It might be a pro or con to some that this model simply rests in your ear. They don’t create a tight seal like the AirPods Pro. Smart home deals [Product: Govee Outdoor Lamp Post | https://www.amazon.com/Govee-Brightness-Integrated-Waterproof-Assistant/dp/B0DXDY4Y26/?tag=theverge02-20, https://govee.sjv.io/c/482924/3014037/12845?u=https%3A%2F%2Fus.govee.com%2Fproducts%2Fgovee-outdoor-lamp-post-lights%3Fcurrency%3DUSD%26variant%3D44850372542649%26stkn%3De32faa3ec03e%26utm_source%3Dgoogle%26utm_medium%3Dcpc%26utm_campaign%3DPmax_US_OutdoorLights_220721%26ot_source%3Dgoogle%26ot_medium%3Dpaidads%26ot_cam%3D17814189508%26ot_grp%3D%26ot_ad%3D%26gad_source%3D1%26gad_campaignid%3D17814192391%26gbraid%3D0AAAAABQ7EBRz7SHi1_QGFkOvAnuTFsUdY%26gclid%3DCj0KCQjw_rPGBhCbARIsABjq9cdwMEFGmCpuNYm7iKQFnTk6Dolt5v1-j1HtZxTizQlTRr4mm0CRQRIaAqliEALw_wcB] * The 8-piece and 14-piece Ring Alarm Pro home security systems have gotten big discounts ahead of Prime Day. The smaller kit of the two is $209.99 ($90 off) and includes a base station (it doubles as a eero 6 Wi-Fi router), a keypad, four contact sensors for doors or windows, a motion detector, and a range extender for the alarm. The 14-piece set doubles the keypads, contact sensors, and motion detectors. Both include a 30-day trial to Ring Protect plan, which will cost $19.99 per month after the trial. [Product: Govee Table Lamp Classic | https://www.amazon.com/Govee-Cordless-Classic-Rechargeable-Portable/dp/B0GLM9BBQT/?tag=theverge02-20, https://govee.sjv.io/c/482924/3014037/12845?u=https%3A%2F%2Fus.govee.com%2Fproducts%2Fblack-cordless-led-table-lamp] * In addition the Echo Dot Max linked right above, Amazon has switched on several deals for its latest smart speakers and displays. The Echo Show 8 is down to $124.99 (originally $180) at Amazon, and the bigger Echo Show 11 is just a little more, costing $149.99 (down from $219.99) at Amazon. If you want bigger sound than the Echo Dot Max can provide, the Echo Studio is your best bet, costing $174.99 (originally $219.99) at Amazon — its best price yet. Finally, Amazon’s Echo Spot that’s great for nightstands is down to $44.99 from $80 at Amazon. [Product: Ring Battery Doorbell Plus (second-gen) | https://www.amazon.com/Ring-Battery-Doorbell-newest-Nickel/dp/B0GGLS1C4W?ref=amzdv_tplus_dp_dsk_bdldp_B0F14N7HHH_B0GGLS1C4W&tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fring-battery-doorbell-plus-newest-model-retinal-2k-with-wide-angle-video-up-to-6x-zoom-night-vision-and-battery-pack-nickel-silver%2FJ39TLSRS6P%2Fsku%2F6672122, https://ring.pxf.io/c/482924/3022805/30431?u=https%3A%2F%2Fring.com%2Fproducts%2Fbattery-doorbell-plus-2nd-gen%2Fcolor%2Fpolishednightnavy] Smartwatch / wearable deals * Fitbit’s Charge 6 fitness tracker has dropped to its lowest price yet at Amazon, costing $79.99 (originally $159.99, but usually around $100). It’s a solid alternative to Google’s $99 and screenless Fitbit Air. The 2023 Charge 6 features an OLED screen, a haptics-based button, plus the ability to ping you with notifications. Read our review. [Product: Apple Watch Series 11 | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FQFPB851/?tag=theverge02-20, https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2FApple-Watch-Series-11-GPS-42mm-Jet-Black-Aluminum-Case-with-Black-Sport-Band-S-M%2F17828855920, http
chineseTitle: 迄今为止最好的亚马逊 Prime Day 早期优惠
chineseSummary: 亚马逊的 Prime Day 比平常更早，要到 6 月 23 日才开始，但您现在就可以查看一些更早的必备产品优惠。举几个例子，苹果的 AirPods Pro 3 在亚马逊和沃尔玛以有史以来最便宜的价格出售（不过，销售一直在玩躲猫猫）。此外，您还可以获取 Ring 的 [...]
chineseContent: 亚马逊的 Prime Day 比平常更早，要到 6 月 23 日才开始，但您现在就可以查看一些更早的必备产品优惠。举几个例子，苹果的 AirPods Pro 3 在亚马逊和沃尔玛以有史以来最便宜的价格出售（不过，销售一直在玩躲猫猫）。此外，您还可以以 60 美元的折扣购买 Ring 最新的电池供电门铃，并且购买时还包括免费的 Indoor Cam Plus。还有足够多的早期 Apple 优惠和很棒的 robovac 折扣，我们已在下周之前展开报道。虽然到目前为止，Prime Day 前的优惠看起来不错，但您可能看不到您正在寻找的品牌或产品 - 希望这些优惠能在 6 月晚些时候推出。 Still, we’ve only included early deals that meet the criteria we hold for all our commerce coverage: they’re good products sold at attractive prices.我们将在 Prime 会员日之前经常更新这篇文章。 Featured Products Apple Watch Series 11 Amazon Kindle Colorsoft Essentials Bundle Lego Ideas - Van Gogh “Starry Night” set Govee Table Lamp Classic Headphone / earbud deals * Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 have been available at their lowest price to date for the past week or so.这款降噪无线耳机原价 249 美元，在亚马逊和百思买售价为 179 美元——无需会员资格。沃尔玛有一个产品页面，售价为 169 美元，但在发布时已经缺货。 The AirPods Pro 3 are the latest earbuds from Apple, packing better bass and active noise cancellation than their predecessor, plus the ability to do some light fitness tracking, among other niceties.阅读我们的评论。 [产品：Bose QuietComfort Ultra 耳机（第二代）| https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FDKQ2FG6?tag=theverge02-20，https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
